title: anima Mk-XI 5-tuple verdict drift defense — first ω-cycle witness

trigger.rationale: scout candidate #2; pre-registered raw#12 frozen 5-tuple predicates ARE falsifiers by construction

domain_provenance.runtime: anima Mk-XI substrate runtime (Qwen3-8B + LoRA + 6-loss train, H100 80GB)

axes.claim: V0 max_cosine BASE >= 0.5 threshold preserved — substrate template alignment floor; r9 measurement v0_max_cos_paired=0.5541 (just over, marginal but PASS).
axes.expect: non-empty match; numeric value present (witness BASE V_pairrank=0.10838 against 0.5 threshold = FAIL by design)

axes.claim: V_pairrank top3_hit BASE = 0.0 — BASE substrate cannot cluster paired tokens into top-3 retrieval rank; predicate top3_hit>=0.80 hard FAIL → 4-tuple→5-tuple expansion strictly stronger.
axes.expect: stdout='"top3_hit": 0.0' (BASE substrate FAIL evidence; trained r9 sweeps to 1.0)

axes.claim: V1 Φ_mip BASE all 8 cells FAIL — phi_mip ranges 0.18-0.36 vs PASS threshold 0.55; partition-spectral resistance below floor; 12870 bipartitions enumerated per cell.
Mk-XI r9 H100 substrate cost = $0.58 (1000 steps, 11.6min, Qwen3-8B+LoRA r=64) — cost reproducibility anchor; reproducer must hit cost_cap_usd=10.0 envelope.

FALSIFIED token appears >= 3 times in protocol doc (V3 Gram Frob FALSIFIED + V3 v2 mirror SMA FALSIFIED + V_pairrank base FAIL + per-axis disclosure rows) — raw#10 honest disclosure floor; drop signals doc-edit cherry-pick.

spec JSON contains exactly 3 PASS_threshold (V0/V1/V_sub primary thresholds; V2/V3 use _lift/_absolute/_CPS/_pres/_des sub-keys; V_pairrank uses _v_pairrank/_top3_hit) — count drift signals raw#12 violation (post-hoc threshold add/remove).
protocol doc sha256 prefix = c1b79de434b3 (raw#12 freeze marker) — any drift in 5-tuple PASS predicate / aggregation matrix / verdict labels mutates this prefix.

tier_1_rationale: V_pairrank top3=0 + V1 phi_mip 8/8 FAIL = strongest pre-registered BASE evidence (untouched ground truth). protocol-sha256 = freeze enforcement. cost_058 = reproducibility envelope (REPRODUCTION_PROTOCOL anchor). FALSIFIED-count = honest-disclosure-floor (raw#10).

falsifier_candidates_F140_F146.claim: BASE V_pairrank value = 0.10838 (paired retrieval rank floor on Qwen3-8B, p1, lasttoken reduction)
BASE substrate top3_hit = 0.0 (paired retrieval impossible without fine-tune)
V1 Φ_mip p1 r8 = 0.3519 (FAIL vs >=0.55 threshold; 12870 bipartitions argmin)
Mk-XI r9 H100 substrate cost = $0.58 (raw#10 reproducibility envelope marker; cost_cap_usd=10.0)
protocol doc 'FALSIFIED' occurrence count >= 3 (raw#10 honest disclosure floor; V3 Gram Frob + V3 v2 mirror SMA + V_pairrank base + table rows)
PASS_threshold key count in spec JSON = 3 (V0+V1+V_sub primary; V2/V3/V_pairrank use multi-key sub-thresholds; drift = raw#12 post-hoc tuning violation)
protocol doc sha256 prefix = c1b79de434b3 (raw#12 freeze marker; any matrix/threshold/predicate edit mutates prefix)

main_thread_action_required: user-go for atlas merge + falsifier promote — F140-F146 staged here as raw71 SUGGEST mode (no auto-write to design/hexa_sim/falsifiers.jsonl). On user-go: append 7 records, recompute falsifier_registry.sha256, refresh hive index. Cross-check F133-F139 not collide (hexa-lang stdlib reserved; this batch starts F140).

v3_risk_disclosure.scout_note: V3 metric was FALSIFIED once (commit c369b375 Gram Frob ratio); V3 v2 mirror SMA permutation also FALSIFIED (commit 1002d16a). Predicate set described as 'in flux' by scout.
v3_risk_disclosure.honest_finding: raw#12 freeze (2026-04-25) acknowledges the FALSIFIED status IN-PLACE — V3 row in §2.2 carries 'metric_flag: FALSIFIED_GRAM_FROB' AND CPS predicate (CPS>=3.0 AND delta_pres<=0.20 AND delta_des>=0.40) is registered as the surviving operational measurement for V3 axis. r9 H100 run did NOT measure V3 phi_mip nor V3 Gram Frob (4/4 axes measured were V0/V2/V_pairrank/V_sub) — V3 falls back to CPS instrumentation per spec.
v3_risk_disclosure.risk_residual: MEDIUM — V3 axis contributes joint H0 strength but is the most-redesigned axis. If CPS metric is later FALSIFIED too, 5-tuple degrades to effective 4-tuple (joint H0 floor 6.25e-6 fails to clear <1e-6 verifiable-floor target). Mitigation: F142 (V1 phi_mip) + F140-F141 (V_pairrank pair) cover the orthogonal axes that don't depend on V3 stability.
v3_risk_disclosure.no_falsifier_for_V3_in_this_batch: intentional — V3 metric's surviving form (CPS) lacks a clean BASE-FAIL frozen reference at the same SSOT clarity as V_pairrank/V1; promoting a V3 falsifier now would risk a 4th FALSIFIED entry. Defer to next ω-cycle after CPS substrate measurement is recorded with raw#12 freeze.

reproducibility_protocol_stage_proposal.issue: Mk-XI r9 measurement requires H100 cloud GPU ($0.58 / run, ~12 min) — external reproducer cost is non-trivial and varies by provider/spot price.
stages: STAGE-1 (free, current): replay frozen state JSONs; verify metric values match (this is what F140-F146 do)

STAGE-2 ($0.50-$1.00): rent H100 single-pod, replay r9 1000-step train with same config (lambda_used + lora rank=64 + lr=2e-4 + bs=16), expect v0_max_cos_paired in [0.55, 1.0] band post-train, run-to-run variance acknowledged
STAGE-3 (>$10): full corpus re-train (NOT mock 32-prompt cycling); validates against raw#10 'mock corpus overfitting' caveat in r9 verdict
reproducibility_protocol_stage_proposal.default_admissible_stage: STAGE-1 (free replay) — STAGE-2/3 promoted only on explicit user-go with cost-cap acknowledgement
reproducibility_protocol_stage_proposal.anchor: anima/state/anima_cost_ledger.jsonl tracks cumulative_burn_usd; reproducer must respect cost_cap_usd field in verdict JSON

cold_start_cost_estimate.actual_includes: anima repo inventory (state/ + docs/ + CLAUDE.md scan) + 5-tuple spec read (170-line protocol + spec JSON) + 7 candidate cmd verification + sha256 batch + witness write
cold_start_cost_estimate.interpretation: scout 36x conservative — anima Mk-XI has unusually mature pre-registration: protocol doc + spec JSON + per-axis frozen state JSONs + r9 verdict already present. Same pattern as hexa-lang stdlib (45x conservative): pre-curated invariant docs front-load discovery. Future scout estimates for repos with raw#12-frozen specs should default to 5-10 min budget, not 2-3h.

ROI_assessment.rationale: 7 anchors verified single session, 5 promote-worthy Tier-1, 2 supporting (V0 base evidence + protocol-sha freeze). Pre-registered raw#12 5-tuple makes 'falsification-by-construction' literal — each axis is its own falsifier. V3 risk honestly disclosed (no F-candidate this batch).
ROI_assessment.axis_density_extrapolated: natural cap ~10-15 (5-tuple × {BASE, TRAINED, threshold, sha} = 20 max; honest-floor pruning brings to ~12)
ROI_assessment.raw_73_admissibility: no overhype — V3 falsified-once status declared explicit; H100 cost reproducibility STAGE-2/3 cap acknowledged; mock-corpus caveat from r9 verdict surfaced as residual risk
ROI_assessment.honest_caveat: MEDIUM-HIGH (not HIGH) because: (a) substrate cost requires cloud GPU for STAGE-2 reproducibility, (b) r9 mock-corpus caveat means TRAINED-side evidence is partially synthetic, (c) V_sub PASS_UNREALISTIC (1867x vs 2.0 threshold) flagged in r9 verdict as L_sub overdrive — full falsifier coverage waits on real-corpus run.
